category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates X cursor files from PNG images; official freedesktop/X.Org repository is under xorg/app
display_name_sources: source_facts.name, executable name, and official X.Org repository name identify the project as xcursorgen
docs_sources: Official X.Org/freedesktop GitLab repository includes the xcursorgen man page, the most specific official documentation surface
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official freedesktop GitLab project and source_facts.repo is empty; freedesktop cgit mirror lists the GitLab clone URL as the source repository
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies X cursor generation from PNG images; official repository path xorg/app/xcursorgen supports X.Org/X11 tags
